title: armeria alpina subsp. godayana
intro: Armeria alpina subsp. godayana, also known as Goday's alpine armeria, is a plant species that belongs to the primrose family and is native to the Iberian Peninsula. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its high content of saponins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which have been found to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Armeria alpina subsp. godayana include its potential to help reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its antimicrobial properties, which can aid in the treatment of wounds and infections. Armeria alpina subsp. godayana can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it is also used in traditional medicine to make tinctures and salves.
